name: Chocolate Macaroon Cake
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 12-cup fluted tube pan with solid shortening. Beat egg white at high speed until soft peaks form. Gradually add sugar; beat until stiff peaks form. Stir in remaining filling ingredients by hand. Set aside. Combine all cake ingredients in a large bowl. Blend on low speed until moistened. Beat for 3 minutes on medium speed, scraping the bowl occasionally. Pour chocolate batter into prepared pan. Drop teaspoonfuls of filling over the chocolate batter. Bake for 55-65 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool upright in the pan for 45 minutes; turn onto a serving plate. Cool completely. Sprinkle with powdered sugar or serve with whipped cream.
